title: E16 2EW, T&L Sugars Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/MP3530HZ/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: T&L Sugars Limited   Installation name: Thames Cane Sugar Refinery   Permit number: EPR/MP3530HZ/V005   "
